payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Partial dark reddish-brown polished wooden dining table edge visible at lower-middle of crop, glossy finish and small portion of tabletop shown behind carved chair backs; the table is edge-cropped by the image and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).
